user_stories.title: Prepare requirements during implementation
user_stories.i_want_to: prepare requirements for the next work item while implementation runs on the current one
user_stories.so_that: I stay productive during the 10-30 minute autonomous execution window

user_stories.title: Natural language ticket intake
user_stories.i_want_to: say 'add Jira-1250 to the backlog' and have the system pull the ticket content and create a draft
user_stories.so_that: I don't manually copy-paste between tools

user_stories.title: Start from prepared requirements
user_stories.i_want_to: say 'start Jira-1250' and have the system find the prepared requirements and begin implementation from Phase 02

user_stories.title: Staleness warning
user_stories.i_want_to: be warned if requirements are stale (codebase changed since Phase A)
user_stories.so_that: I don't implement against outdated assumptions

user_stories.title: Scannable backlog index
user_stories.i_want_to: have BACKLOG.md be a scannable index rather than a 650-line spec repository
user_stories.so_that: I can quickly find and prioritize work items

user_stories.title: Documentation for preparation pipeline
user_stories.i_want_to: have framework docs updated to explain the preparation pipeline
user_stories.so_that: future users (and my future self) understand the new workflow

user_stories.title: Phase A isolation from workflow machinery
user_stories.i_want_to: have Phase A run without state.json or hooks
user_stories.so_that: it never conflicts with an active Phase B workflow
